strategy: His pet Wartle throws up a Spirit Shield that blocks Myth, Life, and Death, so hit him with an Elemental school (Fire, Ice, or Storm) or break the shield first.
He resists Balance 30% and takes a little extra Myth, Life, and Death, but the Spirit Shield counters those, so Elemental hits are cleaner.
Clear the Shadow Shrike and Shadow Sentinel with your setup, then AoE all three; the boss has 12,640 health.
cheatNotes: His pet Wartle casts a Spirit Shield item card on him, blocking Myth, Life, and Death hits.
